nodes.name: Qualification Webhook
nodes.notes: Receives EnrichedLead payload from Research Agent workflow or direct API call.

nodes.name: Score — Firmographic
nodes.notes: Scores company fit: industry (30pts), employee count (25pts), funding (15pts), geography (15pts), tech stack (15pts).

nodes.name: Score — Demographic
nodes.notes: Scores contact fit: seniority (30pts), title match (25pts), department (20pts), decision maker (15pts), completeness (10pts).

nodes.name: Score — Behavioral
nodes.notes: Scores engagement: source quality (25pts), message intent (30pts), UTM signals (20pts), page intent (15pts), timing (10pts).

nodes.name: Score — AI Fit
nodes.notes: Translates Research Agent's LLM analysis into score: ICP fit (40pts), buying signals (25pts), pain points (20pts), urgency (15pts).

nodes.name: Composite Score + Decision
nodes.notes: Computes weighted composite, applies bonuses/penalties, classifies temperature, makes qualification decision.

nodes.name: Route by Decision
nodes.notes: Routes to different output paths: Qualified → Routing Agent, Nurture → Email sequence, Review → Slack, Disqualified → Archive.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ properties: { ai_lead_score: String(Math.round($json.composite_score)), ai_temperature: $json.temperature, ai_qualification_decision: $json.decision, ai_qualification_reasoning: $json.decision_reasoning.substring(0, 2000), lifecyclestage: $json.decision === 'qualified' ? 'salesqualifiedlead' : ($json.decision === 'nurture' ? 'marketingqualifiedlead' : 'subscriber') } }) }}

nodes.name: HubSpot — Update Score
nodes.notes: Updates HubSpot contact with qualification score, temperature, and lifecycle stage.

parameters.text:
=:fire: *Qualified Lead!*

*Contact:* {{ $json.enriched_lead.contact?.full_name || 'Unknown' }} ({{ $json.enriched_lead.contact?.normalized_title || 'Unknown' }})
*Company:* {{ $json.enriched_lead.company?.legal_name || 'Unknown' }}
*Score:* {{ Math.round($json.composite_score) }}/100 — *{{ $json.temperature.toUpperCase() }}*

*Breakdown:*
  Firmographic: {{ $json.firmographic_score }}/100
  Demographic: {{ $json.demographic_score }}/100
  Behavioral: {{ $json.behavioral_score }}/100
  AI Fit: {{ $json.ai_fit_score }}/100

*Decision:* {{ $json.decision.toUpperCase() }} — {{ $json.decision_reasoning }}

_Routing to sales rep..._
